back_translation: Finally, brothers and sisters, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus that, just as you received teaching from us about how you ought to live and please God, just as you are already living, may you increase further
For you know well what commands we gave you by the authority of the Lord Jesus
For this is the will of God, that you receive sanctification, that you abstain from sexual transgression
let each of you know how to control your own body in holiness and honor
not in lustful-craving, like the Gentiles who do not know God
and let no one transgress against or take advantage of one's brother in this matter, because the Lord will execute punishment for all such acts, just as we told in advance and warned you solemnly
For God did not call us toward impurity, but for sanctification
Therefore, the one who rejects this teaching does not reject a human, but rejects God, the One who graciously gives His Holy Spirit to you
Concerning sibling-love, [we] do not need to write to you, for you yourselves have been taught by God to love one another
And in fact you are doing this toward all the brothers and sisters throughout the province of Macedonia. But brothers and sisters, we encourage you to do this more and more
And to aspire to live quietly, to manage your own matters, and to work with your own hands, just as we commanded you
so that you may live respectably toward outsiders, and not have to depend on anyone
Brothers and sisters, we do not want you to be ignorant about those who have fallen asleep, so that you do not grieve like others who have no hope
For if we believe that Jesus died and rose to life, likewise God will bring those who fell asleep in Jesus along with Him
We say this matter to you by the word of the Lord, that we who are still alive and remain until the coming of the Lord, will absolutely not precede those who have fallen asleep
For the Lord Himself will descend from heaven, with the sound of a command, the voice of an archangel, and the trumpet of God; then those who have died in Christ will be the ones to rise first
After that, we who are still alive and remain will be taken up together with them in the clouds, to meet the Lord in the sky; and so we will be with the Lord forever
Therefore, do encourage one another with these words
